message:
feat(tests): add Loom concurrency tests for MPSC, budget, task phase, queue (bd-2ktrc.5)

Adds 8 new Loom model-checked tests covering MPSC channel (concurrent
sends no loss, bounded capacity, single producer ordering), budget
counter (no negative, exact exhaustion), task phase transitions (cancel
vs complete atomicity), and local queue LIFO/FIFO semantics. Also fixes
clippy warnings in existing loom tests (needless_continue, redundant
clone, significant_drop_tightening).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
